mission.title: istio: Unable to remove server header
mission.description: Unable to remove server header. Requested by 29+ users.

steps.title: Check current istio deployment
steps.description:
Verify your istio version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
helm list -n istio 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working istio installation.

steps.title: Review istio configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant istio configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
kubectl get configmap -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=istio
```
**Bug description**
I should be able to remove/disable the server: istio-envoy when using istio  

**Expected behavior**

using the following configuration on a virtual service, I should be able to 

Headers:
      Response:
        Remove:

steps.title: Apply the fix for Unable to remove server header
steps.description:
any suggestions/concerns in elevating this configuration option to a first class API so users don't need to rely on EnvoyFilter? Happy to discuss it during Networking WG but let's do the first round of back and forth on this issue.
```yaml
apiVersion: config.istio.io/v1alpha2
kind: rule
metadata:
  name: remove-server
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  match: source.workload.name == "istio-ingressgateway"
  responseHeaderOperations:
    - name: server
      operation: REMOVE
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n istio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio
kubectl get events -n istio --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Unable to remove server header" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: any suggestions/concerns in elevating this configuration option to a first class API so users don't need to rely on EnvoyFilter? Happy to discuss it during Networking WG but let's do the first round of back and forth on this issue.
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: config.istio.io/v1alpha2
kind: rule
metadata:
  name: remove-server
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  match: source.workload.name == "istio-ingressgateway"
  responseHeaderOperations:
    - name: server
      operation: REMOVE

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: ingress
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  httpOptions:
    server_name: Apache

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: server-name-tweaks
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  configPatches:
  - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER # http connection manager is a filter in Envoy
    match:
      listener:
        filterChain:
          filter:
            name: "envoy.http_connection_manager"
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        config:
          server_name: "custom server name"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with istio installed or the issue environment reproducible.
